description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black body accented by metallic orange highlights. The stock is angular and robust, with a skeletonized structure for reduced weight and improved ergonomics. The receiver and handguard are integrated into a streamlined frame, with visible mechanical details and a prominent trigger guard. The barrel is long and slender, with a series of vented cutouts near the muzzle, suggesting a focus on heat dissipation and accuracy. The magazine appears to be detachable and is positioned just ahead of the trigger, while the sighting system is low-profile and integrated into the top rail. The overall construction suggests a tactical, high-performance firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, black and orange tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, long vented barrel, and integrated sight. The design is sleek and angular, emphasizing performance and ergonomics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the skeletonized stock, vented barrel, and orange accents.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the handguard and sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with clear visibility of the stock and magazine area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver, showing the rifle's symmetry and compactness.
